findings.description: Section title zh '敏捷开发受到需求的背景' is slightly unnatural; the image heading means 'background driving demand for agile development', better rendered as '敏捷开发受到重视的背景' or '敏捷开发兴起的背景'. Meaning is not inverted, only phrasing is awkward.

reviewer_notes: Both background and characteristics sections are accurately represented. The comparison table (3 data rows: advance planning, project scale, response to spec changes) matches the image table exactly. The 'もっと詳しく！' demerits sidebar is captured as term entity p256::5 with accurate content. One low-severity zh phrasing issue in the section title.
